overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a samurai-themed video game showing a hooded character walking through a snowy mountain landscape. The character crosses an ancient stone bridge, passes another traveler, and approaches a frozen waterfall in a serene winter setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain trail approaching stone bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path toward the bridge ahead

entered.detail: ancient stone arch bridge spanning a frozen gorge
snow-dusted bare trees lining the mountain path
steep snow-covered rock face rising beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding cobblestone path through a snowy mountain pass. Leafless trees and snow-covered rocks line the trail as an ancient stone bridge comes into view ahead against the grey winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone bridge over frozen gorge

events.description: another traveler runs past from left to right, overtaking the character on the bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge at steady pace

notable_agents.action: traveler in dark clothing runs past from behind on the left side, continuing ahead across the bridge

entered.detail: low stone walls lining both sides of the bridge deck
ice-covered river visible through gaps in the bridge walls

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the snow-dusted stone bridge with low walls on either side overlooking the frozen river below. Another traveler suddenly runs past from the left, overtaking the character before exiting the bridge ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley path with scattered pines

agents.ego_description: continuing along the stone path through the wider valley

entered.detail: evergreen trees heavy with snow lining the path
partially frozen body of water visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: Following the stone path through a wider valley, the character passes snow-laden evergreen trees and bushes. A frozen pond becomes visible to the right as the trail continues winding deeper into the winter landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen waterfall basin with icy pool

events.description: stone path ends at the edge of a frozen pond at the waterfall base
character slows and stops at the water's edge facing the waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking onto the frozen surface then stopping to observe the waterfall

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down rock face into the frozen pool
spray rising from the falling water creating fog at the base
icicles and frozen spray on rocks surrounding the falls

segments.scene_description: The stone path gives way to a frozen pond as the character approaches a misty waterfall cascading down the rocks. The character slows to a stop at the water's edge, facing the falling water and rising mist in the dim winter twilight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate mountain pass that gradually leads to a misty, frozen waterfall. It begins with a character walking along a winding cobblestone path lined with leafless trees and snow-covered rocks under a grey winter sky. As the path leads onto a snow-dusted stone bridge overlooking a frozen river, another traveler suddenly runs past from the left and disappears ahead. The scene then expands into a wider valley of snow-laden evergreens and bushes, where the trail winds past a frozen pond. Finally, the stone path gives way to the water's edge as the character slows to a stop before a cascading waterfall and rising mist in the dim winter twilight.
